$comment: Machine-readable field definitions for Agent Skills frontmatter. Combines base spec (agentskills.io) with Claude Code extensions.

name.description: Skill identifier. Must match parent directory name. Lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens.

description.description: What the skill does + when to use it. Third-person voice. Keyword-rich for discovery.
examples: Extracts text and tables from PDF files, fills forms, merges documents. Use when working with PDF files or document extraction.
Generates descriptive commit messages by analyzing git diffs. Use when writing commit messages or reviewing staged changes.

license.description: License name or reference to bundled LICENSE file.

compatibility.description: Environment requirements. Only include if the skill has specific needs.
examples: Designed for Claude Code with shell access.
Requires git, docker, jq, and access to the internet.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value mapping. Common keys: author, version, purpose, type.

commonKeys.author: Creator name or team (e.g., 'nebula-aurora')
commonKeys.purpose: One of: meta-skill, development, admin, utility, other

allowed-tools.description: Space-delimited list of pre-approved tools. Defined in Agent Skills spec but NOT supported by Claude Code. Do not include in frontmatter.

disable-model-invocation.description: true = only user can invoke via /name. Removes from Claude's context. Use for side-effect workflows.

user-invocable.description: false = hidden from / menu. Only Claude can invoke. Use for background knowledge skills.

model.description: Override model when this skill is active.

context.description: fork = run in isolated subagent context. Skill content becomes subagent prompt.

agent.description: Subagent type when context: fork. Options: Explore, Plan, general-purpose, or custom from .claude/agents/.

hooks.description: Hooks scoped to this skill's lifecycle.

substitutions.$ARGUMENTS: All arguments passed when invoking the skill.

dynamicContext.description: Shell commands run before content is sent to Claude. Output replaces the placeholder.
